headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Expands GTT Partnership To Launch New Secure Networking Services
summary: GTT Communications and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) expanded their global partnership to launch new managed secure networking services. The collaboration focuses on delivering secure access service edge (SASE) and managed LAN/WLAN offerings for enterprise customers. The new services combine GTT’s Envision platform with HPE Aruba Central to support simplified network operations and end to end security. Hewlett Packard Enterprise is deepening its role in cloud and enterprise...

headline: Super Micro Jumps 6%, Dell Climbs 7%, HPE Rises 5% as AI Hardware Rebounds With the NASDAQ
summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI), Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL), and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) are all rallying Tuesday midday as AI hardware names ride a broad market rebound. Super Micro Computer stock is up 6% to $25.23, Dell stock is up 7% to $406.60, and HPE stock is up 5% to $46.76. The move comes ... headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise: Networking Is Now The Profit Engine, And Nobody Repriced It
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise is shifting to higher-margin networking, reducing risk via H3C divestiture and trading at a discount. See why HPE stock is a Buy.

headline: GTT and HPE Deepen Partnership to Deliver Secure Enterprise Cloud Networking
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., July 21, 2026--GTT and HPE deliver new managed services spanning SASE and managed LAN/WLAN to help enterprises simplify operations and strengthen security.
